packs.name: Market Value Social Media Post
packs.description: Cross-format market value pack with PSD, Canva, Figma, AI, and EPS source options.
packs.notes: General market-value content pack with multi-tool source support; good bridge between real estate and broader business education content.

packs.name: Business Social Media Pack
packs.description: Business-oriented pack with Facebook, Instagram, and Pinterest PSD layouts.
packs.notes: Multi-platform business pack; useful for non-real-estate service brands and generic social starter kits.

packs.name: High Quality Media Social Post Mockup
packs.description: Presentation mockup pack with four PSD social post mockup scenes and instruction PDF.
packs.notes: Mockup-only asset pack for showcasing finished designs in portfolio, marketing, or template previews.

packs.name: Business Social Media Template
packs.description: Six-layout business template pack with PSD, AI, and EPS source files.
packs.notes: Strong reusable business pack with multiple formats; good candidate for broader Posterboy starter categories.

packs.name: Business Social Media Post
packs.description: Compact business social post pack with Illustrator, EPS, and PDF help file assets.
packs.notes: Small source pack; likely better as inspiration or a lightweight import candidate than a flagship template set.

packs.name: High Quality Elegant Instagram Social Media Mockup
packs.description: Elegant Instagram mockup pack with three PSD scenes and a help file.
packs.notes: Mockup-only asset pack suited for polished preview rendering and launch or marketing presentation.

packs.name: High Quality Social Media Mockup
packs.description: Four-scene social media mockup pack with PSD sources and guide PDF.
packs.notes: General-purpose mockup pack for presenting finished templates, campaign previews, and product visuals.
